creator: ykasap@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #7)
> I'm not 100% sure, but I think you can add "USES+= shebangfix" (or add it to
> the end of existing USES) and then define SHEBANG_FILES=<same list of files>
> and delete the post-patch target completely.  See Mk/Uses/shebangfix.mk

The line to be replaced doesn't start with "#!", so I think I cannot use
shebangfix here.  Maybe I can override _SHEBANG_REINPLACE_ARGS but 
no other port does it, so for this time I want to keep this untouched.
